[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 00010000 1
1 00000000 a
2 00000010 1
3 00010100 2
4 00000000 a
5 00000000 a
6 00000100 1
7 00001000 1
